# Date Picker

Opens a calendar from a compact trigger and returns an ISO date string.

## Installation

Add Date Picker from the configured StackTrace registry.

```shell
npx shadcn-vue@latest add @stacktrace/date-picker
```

## Usage

Use the packaged Date Picker when users should select one day from a popover and form state prefers a date-only string. Bind `v-model` to `string | undefined` and set `placeholder` for the empty trigger label.

**Date picker example**

```vue
<template>
  <DatePicker v-model="value" class="w-[280px]" />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DatePicker } from '@/Components/DatePicker'

const value = ref<string>()
</script>
```

## Value type

The model is an ISO calendar date such as `2026-07-11`. Internally it is parsed with `parseDate`; localized strings, JavaScript `Date` objects, and date-time strings are not accepted. An empty model becomes `undefined`. This makes the value convenient for date-only form fields without silently attaching a time zone.

## Formatting and time zone

The local component displays the selected value with a fixed `en-US` long-date formatter. It uses the browser's local time zone only while converting the date value for display; the ISO model remains a zone-free calendar day. The wrapper does not expose a locale or time-zone prop. Compose Calendar, Popover, and Button directly when the product must control those policies.

## Portal and layout

Pass `to` as a selector or element to change where Popover content is portalled. Width classes apply to the trigger through the component's `class` attribute. The packaged calendar uses a single month and focuses the calendar when it opens.

## Accessibility and validation

Pair the trigger with a visible field label and keep the empty label descriptive. The packaged wrapper does not expose an id or accessible name prop for its internal trigger; compose Popover, Button, and Calendar directly when explicit label association is required. Reka provides popover focus handling and calendar keyboard navigation; avoid closing the popover on every internal key event. Validate the ISO model in surrounding form state and render an adjacent error. For selectable bounds or unavailable dates, use a custom Calendar composition because this wrapper does not expose those rules.

## Choosing a date control

> **Use Date Input when typing matters: [Date Input](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/date-input)**
>
> Date Input keeps the ISO string model but adds editable date segments for keyboard-heavy workflows.

> **Use Calendar for policy and localization: [Calendar](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/calendar)**
>
> Compose Calendar directly when you need locale control, multiple selection, disabled dates, bounds, or a permanently visible grid.

> **Use Date Range Picker for two endpoints: [Date Range Picker](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/date-range-picker)**
>
> Use Date Range Picker when the value is an inclusive start and end date rather than one day.

Hosted documentation: [Date Picker](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/date-picker)
